info.title: deadsharp
info.description: A tool for analyzing C# projects to identify dead code

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to the project or solution to analyze

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output for detailed analysis information

options.name: --ignore-migrations
options.description: Ignore database migration files during analysis

options.name: --ignore-azure-functions
options.description: Ignore Azure Function files during analysis

options.name: --enhanced-di-detection
options.description: Enable enhanced dependency injection detection to better identify classes used only in DI containers

options.name: --enhanced-dataflow
options.description: Enable enhanced data flow analysis using deep semantic analysis to detect complex usage patterns through indirect references, factory patterns, and control flow tracking

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to save the analysis results in JSON format

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format for results (JSON or TXT). Default is console if no format is specified. [default: console]
